NATIVE- Involved in Medical profession-an Anaesthesist.
SATURN+MOON+DRAGON HEAD
KARMA+MANA+MOHAKA
Retro Jupiteris in Leo, aspects the rear sign of Cancer which is
the North, saturn also in the North with Moon and Dragon Head.
Hence. Thus it is Saturn aspect towards the above seated 3
planet. Venus is in the 2nd to Saturn. because Sagittarius is the

78 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
East Sign and Aries is also the East. Therefore Venus responds
to Saturn by sitting in the East. Pisces is north, Aries, Leo and
Sagittarius Represent East and after North the 2nd is the East,
Therefore, It is considered SATURN+MOON+DRAGON
HEAD with Retro Jupiter aspect and in the 2nd there is Venus,
thus indicating Kanna+Mana+Maya and Venus for Secret
knowledge pertaining to Medicine and Jupiter aspect is guide.
Hence this natives also an anaesthesist. From the above, it can be
observed that career can be identified on the basis of causitivity
of Planets.
